description: Mapify is an AI mind-mapping and summarization tool that turns text, websites, videos, documents, and other content into structured mind maps. It is operated by Xmind and offers mind-map generation workflows for end users and AI assistants.
summary: Mapify exposes an MCP server at `https://mapify.so/mcp`; public docs are sparse, but the official MCP server README shows authentication via a user-generated Mapify API key passed as a Bearer token.
